title: So whats Bardiels story
wikitext:
[]: So what's Bardiel's story?             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Sun Aug 09, 2009 10:30 am I guess the primary theory now is that when Adam sploded he sent eggs all around the Earth, except for two which went into space. So what's Bardiel's story? And what is he anyway? Some sort of bacteria that was hiding in a cloud?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Aug 09, 2009 10:48 am Yeah. Pretty much.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Sun Aug 09, 2009 11:36 am I'd actually thought the entire cloud was Bardiel, meaning it was fairly large in it's pre-Eva03 form. But screw Bardiel, the real mystery is Iruel. Where'd he come from and why didn't he hack other shit?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Aug 09, 2009 11:52 am MugwumpHasNoLiver wrote: But screw Bardiel, the real mystery is Iruel. Where'd he come from and why didn't he hack other shit?

[]: Re: So what's Bardiel's story?             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 09, 2009 12:09 pm DEMOLITION D+ wrote: Some sort of bacteria that was hiding in a cloud?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Aug 09, 2009 1:52 pm Space spores.

[]:             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Sun Aug 09, 2009 6:25 pm So essentially you guys are telling me that when Second Impact occured Adam sneezed at the exact same time and thus Bardiel was born. Great.

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Sun Aug 09, 2009 8:08 pm Actually, he could have been an energy being that became a fungus upon merging with Eva-03. Remember the lightning? Or, he could have been a dead ringer for Eva-03 and simply swapped places with the Eva when it passed through the cloud...

[]:             Quote Post by Barong » Mon Aug 10, 2009 9:44 am Considering that Sandalphons embryonic form didn't have anything to do with the final product, I suppose when its incubation period ended Bardiel, too, just rapidly transformed/evolved ínto whatever it was in the end.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Aug 10, 2009 2:09 pm So essentially you guys are telling me that when Second Impact occured Adam sneezed at the exact same time and thus Bardiel was born. Great.
